name: Boom
short_description: Boom is a fast-paced action game where players face off against different monsters in each stage. Pick up different bombs and power-ups to defeat enemies and progress through challenging levels. Join the explosive fun today!
detailed_description:
Get ready for explosive excitement in Boom! In this fast-paced action game, you'll face off against a variety of monsters in each stage. As you progress through the levels, you'll have the opportunity to pick up different bombs and power-ups that will help you defeat your enemies and advance to the next stage. With challenging gameplay, colorful graphics, and a variety of levels to play through, Boom will keep you on the edge of your seat from start to finish. Don't wait any longer to join the action - download Boom today and see if you have what it takes to be the ultimate bomber, but be careful not to get blown up first!

Features

  • Fast-paced action gameplay
  • Find key hidden inside the crates to open the door to complete the level
  • Collect different types of power-ups hidden inside the crates
  • Customize your character from top to bottom
  • Progressive difficulty that increases as the player advance through the levels
  • Unique boss fight in final level of the stage

Upcoming Features

  • More single player levels (5 different stages with 20 levels each)
  • Multiplayer mode - play with 2-4 players/friends
  • Multiplayer mode - different modes (free-for-all, team)
  • Steam achievements
  • Steam leaderboard
